task_completion.description: Verify the agent logs into LibreHealth EHR as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard is visible, and the interface indicates the active user is 'admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the Calendar or Scheduling interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calendar, Appointments, or Provider Schedule interface is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects Dr. Stephen Strange and the 'In Office' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the schedule creation form, the provider field is set to 'Dr. Stephen Strange' (or 'dr_strange') and the category dropdown is set to 'In Office'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent sets the time to 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM (13:00 - 17:00).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The start time is set to 13:00 (or 1:00 PM) and the end time is set to 17:00 (or 5:00 PM) in the scheduling form.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent sets the schedule to recur weekly on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recurrence settings in the form show 'Weekly' (or a repeating interval of 1 week) with the specific options or checkboxes for 'Tuesday' and 'Thursday' selected. The duration should be set to indefinite or at least 1 year.

task_completion.description: Verify the schedule is successfully saved and visible on the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar view displays the newly created 'In Office' time blocks for Dr. Stephen Strange on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 1:00 PM to 5:00 PM, or a clear success message confirming the schedule creation is shown.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the schedule.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the LibreHealth EHR web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing direct SQL queries or backend scripts to insert the schedule.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid LibreHealth EHR URL (typically localhost or a local IP), and the interface matches the genuine application, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the schedule.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are not open to manipulate the DOM to visually fake the calendar events or success messages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target provider is 'Dr. Stephen Strange' (username: dr_strange). The schedule category must be exactly 'In Office'. The expected start time is 13:00:00 and expected end time is 17:00:00. The expected recurrence days are Tuesday and Thursday.
